title: delphinium elatum subsp. villosum
intro: Delphinium elatum subsp. villosum, commonly known as the hairy tall delphinium, is a plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial plant known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain delphinine, a toxic alkaloid with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and may also have antimicrobial and antiviral effects. Delphinium elatum subsp. villosum can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
